tender.description: Hiring of 1 no. hydraulic operated high pressure suction cum jetting machine mounted on Mahindra Bolero of water tank 1500 liters for maintenance of sewerage system in narrow lanes at Inderpuri sewer store in Rajinder Nagar Constituency AC-39
